_comment: WP-005 — recording-bridge-claude-session fixture (deferred infra need; ADR-002, MEA-09). A RECORDED real stream-json session, replayed by RecordedSessionBridge, covering all four resolution cases so the relay + resolution + binding + lock + composer run in CI WITHOUT a live claude. The full LIVE round-trip is the BLOCK-and-hand-to-founder observation on the founder machine. Each case carries: the resolution kind resolveSession should report (side-effect-free), and the ordered stream-json events the recorded session emitted (system/init → stream_event deltas → result/success), which the adapter maps to ChatStreamEvents (state → chunk* → complete). `resumed` is derived from the resolution (resumable/mid-step ⇒ true), never synthesised. The mid-step case is the FR-N5 proof: the recorded reply RE-RUNS the incomplete step (it talks about resuming the work) rather than reporting a fake done.

delta.text: and I'm picking up where we left off.
let me read the context first.
Resuming — the previous step was left half-finished,
so I'm re-running it now rather than reporting it done.
